name: keyvision
description: A Python server that identifies household keys from photos. Enroll keys by uploading images, then recognize unknown keys by pointing a camera at them.

scripts.docker:local:stop: docker ps -q --filter ancestor=sghiassy/keyvision:local | xargs docker stop
scripts.docker:build:image: npm run docker:context:default && docker build --platform linux/amd64 -t sghiassy/keyvision .
scripts.docker:deploy: npm run docker:context:hostinger && docker stack deploy -c docker-compose.yml keyvision
scripts.caddy:reload: docker context use hostinger && docker service update --force myapp_caddy
